0.title: 2026 Season Preview: A Clean Slate in the ACC
0.subtitle: Seventeen teams, zero losses, and one trophy — the dynasty league kicks off Week 0
0.author: Tdoghawks23

sections.heading: Season Outlook
sections.content: Opening day is finally here. Every team in the conference sits at 0-0, and for one more week, everyone can dream about hoisting the ACC Championship trophy. Clemson opens the season at the top of the preseason Dynasty Poll and enters as the team to beat, but Miami, Louisville, and SMU all have legitimate title aspirations. With a 15-week road to the conference championship, the margin for error is thin — early stumbles in September have a way of haunting teams come November.

sections.heading: Teams to Watch
sections.content: Clemson carries the preseason #1 tag and the pressure that comes with it. Miami boasts the most explosive offense on paper, while Louisville's balanced roster makes the Cardinals a trendy title pick. Don't sleep on the middle of the pack either — NC State, Duke, and Pittsburgh all cracked the preseason Top 25, and Georgia Tech and Virginia Tech are lurking just behind them. At the bottom, Wake Forest and Stanford are looking to prove the projections wrong.

sections.heading: Week 0 Kickoff Slate
sections.content: The season wastes no time: #1 Clemson hosts #5 Miami in Death Valley in a blockbuster opener with early conference-race implications, and #9 Louisville welcomes #11 SMU for a primetime clash of Top-25 contenders. Rivalry season starts immediately too — Virginia Tech travels to Virginia for the Commonwealth Clash, North Carolina visits NC State, and Stanford heads to Berkeley for the Big Game. Duke at Wake Forest rounds out the slate. Buckle up.
